meaning: lane 特鲁里街(伦敦西区街名,曾以剧场集中著称)
examples: Loutherbourg arrived in England in 1771, and immediately went to work as a set designer at the famous Drury Lane Theater in London.
In this, he synthesized all his tricks from Drury Lane: mechanical motions, sound, light, other special effects to create, if you will, an early multimedia production.
Metropolitan State, which will play Drury for the Division II title, knocked out San Antonio-based St.
After entering yet another room full of women, Drury decided to get certified as a dance fitness instructor.
